title: [FIRRTL] Support special format substitutions in Chisel verification intrinsics
body:
Add support for {{SimulationTime}} and {{HierarchicalModuleName}} substitutions in FIRRTL verification intrinsics (circt_chisel_assert, circt_chisel_assume, circt_chisel_ifelsefatal).

Extract format string parsing logic from FIRParser into a new parseFormatString() utility function in FIRRTLUtils that handles both percent format strings (%b, %d, %x, %c, %%) and special substitutions. Update CirctAssertConverter to use this. Change FIRRTLToHW lowering to properly resolve format strings in verification statements

Close https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/9388, https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/8817
